name: Is Type to Siri better than voice commands for optimization?
description: Type to Siri is often better in noisy places or when voice recognition is inconsistent.

mainEntity.name: Is Type to Siri better than voice commands for optimization?

acceptedAnswer.text: Compare Siri with Type to Siri if voice recognition is the main problem. Type to Siri can be a strong fallback when you are in a noisy place, have accessibility needs, or want more control over wording.
acceptedAnswer.description: Type to Siri is often better in noisy places or when voice recognition is inconsistent.
